title: Dynamic Music Updated
description: A fork of LudoCrypt's Dynamic Music !
body:
# A fork of [LudoCrypt](https://modrinth.com/user/LudoCrypt)'s mod [Dynamic Music](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/dynamic-music) updated to 1.19+!

Complete with all the new musics from 1.17 and 1.19 !

Now with support for both Fabric and Forge thanks to [Architectury](https://modrinth.com/mod/architectury-api)

## Warning

If you are coming from a version of this mod <= 2.2.2 you will need to regenerate the config file by changing any option in the music selector part of the config screen and then saving or else the game will crash upon loading a world!

## New Music Cues

Dynamic music makes it so appropriate music play depending on if your are in a cave, if you are in a hot/cold biome and if it's nightime/raining.

## Dynamic Music Pitch

Dynamic Music comes with an option to make the music play slower when the time approaches midnight.

This will effect will also happen sooner in the day if you are close to a mineshaft!

## The End

This mod also comes with original music composed by LudoCrypt for the End dimension.
- Creative Mode :
   - [Borat](https://ludocrypt.bandcamp.com/track/borat)
   - [Balloon](https://ludocrypt.bandcamp.com/track/balloon)
   - [Ethereal Ereria](https://ludocrypt.bandcamp.com/track/ethereal-ereria)
   - [Edreit](https://ludocrypt.bandcamp.com/track/edreit)
 - Dragon Fight :
   - [Granted to End](https://ludocrypt.bandcamp.com/track/granted-to-end)
   - [Boats and Butterflies](https://ludocrypt.bandcamp.com/track/boats-and-butterflies)
   - [Eccedentesiant](https://ludocrypt.bandcamp.com/track/eccedentesiast)

Please ask LudoCrypt directly if you want to use them.

## Dependencies
For Forge and Fabric:

- [Cloth Config API](https://modrinth.com/mod/cloth-config)
- [Architectury](https://modrinth.com/mod/architectury-api)

Only for Fabric:

- [Fabric API](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api)

## Config
Everything in this mod can be toggle and tweaked with a nice graphical interface thanks to [Cloth Config](https://modrinth.com/mod/cloth-config)

On Fabric you will need [Mod Menu](https://modrinth.com/mod/modmenu) (or [Catalogue](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/catalogue-fabric) with [Menulogue](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/menulogue)) in order to access the config screen

## Known Incompatibilities

This mod is __not__ compatible with any other mod that adds/modifies the music for the overworld/the end
